hamiltonian.final: H_final = -sum_i h_i Z_i - sum_i J_i Z_i Z_{i+1}

bitstring_convention: Characters follow stored Pauli-label order; bit 0 has Z eigenvalue +1 and bit 1 has Z eigenvalue -1.

exactness.primary_solver: Exact dynamic programming on a path, O(q) time and O(q) retained-path memory.
exactness.closed_form: All h_i and J_i are positive, so every final-Hamiltonian term is minimized by |0...0>.
exactness.small_q_oracle: All 2**q bitstrings enumerated independently for q=2..20.

commercial_solver_context.gurobi: Supports binary variables and quadratic objectives through gurobipy.
commercial_solver_context.cplex: Supports mixed-integer quadratic optimization through the CPLEX Python API.
commercial_solver_context.selection: Neither proprietary package is required: the current path-graph Ising family has a stronger, dependency-free exact O(q) solver. The exported QUBO is directly representable in either solver.
